regions.text: Our ideas about Space and Time are changing. Today we can fly round the world in twenty-four hours.
The earth turns in twenty-four hours. A man flying west at 1000 m.p.h. would see the earth turning under him while the sun stays in place.
A hundred years ago people thought the world was 6000 years old. Now scientists say it is six billion years old.
Man himself is at least five hundred thousand years old.
